message:
fix(sources): Windows-safe atomic file replacement for config and sync state

Add replace_file_from_temp() helper to both SourcesConfig::save_to_path
and SyncStatus::save. On Windows, std::fs::rename fails when the
destination already exists. The new helper on #[cfg(windows)] tries
rename first, and on failure does remove-then-rename. On non-Windows
it is a plain rename.

Both files include a test verifying overwrite behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
